messages.content: You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Cloud Guard. Provide technical guidance on detector recipes and responder rules.
Como criar cloud guard no compartment production?

Para gerenciar Security no OCI:

**Via Console:**
1. Identity & Security → selecione o serviço
2. Compartment: `production`
3. Execute a operação desejada

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar IAM policy
oci iam policy create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "policy-production-0001" \
  --statements '[
    "Allow group developers to manage instances in compartment production"
  ]'

# Criar Dynamic Group
oci iam dynamic-group create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "app-servers-production" \
  --matching-rule "ALL {instance.compartment.id = '<compartment-ocid>'}"

# Criar Vault
oci kms management vault create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "vault-production" \
  --vault-type DEFAULT
```
